text: Inside this bright, modern space, I feel an initial sense of disorientation—the angles are skewed, doors and lines all off-kilter, and reflections bend my perception. A sensation of being both inside and outside the scene rises in me, prompting reflections on boundaries and transparency. Moving deeper, vibrant colors and the large 'R+D' catch my attention, inviting curiosity. The environment hums with possibility, evoking a feeling of anticipation—perhaps the birth of ideas, innovation in progress. Yet, there's also a curious detachment, as though I'm in a gallery of thought, examining creativity as both participant and observer.
